preview: Verify Display App turns Red (Busy) when meeting starts

1. Create and approve a meeting for Room A
2. Wait until meeting start time
3. Observe tablet screen at Room A entrance
Screen turns Red and shows meeting name, chairperson, and current time
Display App is connected via WiFi and assigned to Room A
Verify Display App turns Green (Available) when room is empty

1. Ensure Room B has no ongoing meeting
2. Observe tablet screen at Room B entrance
Screen shows Green color with Available status
Display App is connected and assigned to Room B
Verify next meeting schedule is displayed on Display App

1. Book 2 consecutive meetings for the same room
2. During the first meeting, observe Display App
Display shows current meeting info and next meeting schedule for the room
Room has at least 2 approved consecutive meetings
Verify 15-minute end warning notification before meeting ends

1. Use an approved meeting currently in progress
2. Wait until 15 minutes before end time
3. Check App/Email notifica...
System sends Do you want to extend? notification to Creator and Meeting Room Manager
Meeting is in progress with 15 minutes remaining

1. Receive 15-minute warning
2. User clicks Extend on App
3. Manager (thuky) logs in and approves extension
4. Verify...
Extension is approved if next slot is free; meeting time is updated; notifications are sent
Meeting is in progress and next slot is available
Verify auto reminder every 5 minutes when meeting exceeds scheduled time

1. Let meeting end without End or Extend action
2. Observe App/Email notifications
3. Record interval between reminders
System sends reminder every 5 minutes until meeting is ended or extended
Meeting has ended but User has not confirmed end/extend
Verify multi-channel notifications (Email and Push) when meeting is approved

1. User (daibieu1) creates a booking request
2. Manager (thuky) approves the request
3. Check Email and App notificat...
Participants receive notifications via Email and Push notification on Cypresscom meeting App
Meeting was just approved; participants have App installed and valid email
Verify Display App, end warning, meeting extension, and auto reminder per SRS sections 3.2, 3.3 and 4.3
